title: NYC Comptroller — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Office of the Comptroller object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the Checkbook NYC API (checkbooknyc.com/api — Spending, Contracts, Budget, Revenue, Payroll domains), the Office of the Comptroller NYC Open Data assets, and comptroller.nyc.gov (WordPress).

Borough.description: NYC borough (or a citywide/various marker used across Comptroller data).

Money.description: A monetary amount. Checkbook and Comptroller financial data are USD; the amount mirrors Checkbook fields such as check_amount, current_amount, disposition_amount.

FiscalYear.description: NYC fiscal year (July 1 – June 30), labeled by the ending calendar year. Checkbook `fiscal_year`.

Location.description: A physical location spine — free-form address plus borough and optional coordinates.

AgencyReference.description: A reference to a City agency as it appears in Checkbook / Comptroller data (e.g. 'Police Department', 'Department of Education').
